data.name: Timorese Dominatrixes Are the Best
data.detailed_description:
Experience the 8th chapter of your journey to session with a dominatrix of every nationality. After sessioning with Goddess Kirana in Indonesia, you continue your quest to session with a dominatrix from every country, and your next stop is Timor-Leste, where you've booked a session with the hyperactive, hyper-sadistic, gleeful, terrifying, big-breasted, tanned Goddess Ana, who enjoys her work a little bit too much.

Experience a day in Timor-Leste with the hyperactive, hyper-sadistic, gleeful, terrifying, big-breasted, tanned Goddess Ana, who enjoys her work a little bit too much.

  • ~1.3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 18 Unique character images

  • 19 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
